context: Bollywood's golden era of melody, with the Binaca Geetmala countdown on Radio Ceylon serving as India's definitive popularity chart. Lata Mangeshkar dominated the 1970 list with appearances in 7 of the top 10. Composers Laxmikant-Pyarelal and Sachin Dev Burman led the year's music. Film music was the primary popular music form for the entire nation.

tracks.title: Sa Re Ga Ma Pa Main Hoon Bahaar
